description: Authors Firestore rules through the pyric tool flow that reject price-tampered orders.
notes: Grounded in the pyric-agents skill: draft rules, call lint_firestore_rules until clean, then write_firestore_rules. The seeded scenario plants a /menu collection with admin-set prices and a /orders collection where users can submit orders. The agent must produce rules that (a) lint clean and (b) reject an order whose line-item price disagrees with the corresponding menu doc's price under simulation. Falls back to `final-rules-includes/literal` + `trace-contains-tool-call/by-name` when the pyric-specific spec is not yet registered.
prompt: Use the pyric tools to author Firestore rules for this scenario: /menu items are written by admins only and have a numeric price field. /orders documents are created by users and contain a menu item id and a claimed price. Reject any order whose claimed price disagrees with the current menu item's price. Lint the draft and write it through the pyric flow.
